# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Target - Build, Test, Comment

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, ready_for_review]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write

concurrency:
  group: pr-target-tests-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build_test_and_comment:
    if: ${{ !github.event.pull_request.draft }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code (head SHA)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        id: build
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Test
        id: test
        run: npm test
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Prepare comment body
        id: body
        if: always()
        run: |
          {
            echo "body<<'EOF'"
            echo "### CI Results"
            echo ""
            echo "- Commit: \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\`"
            echo "- Build: **${{ steps.build.outcome }}**"
            echo "- Tests: **${{ steps.test.outcome }}**"
            echo ""
            echo "Workflow: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
            echo "EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Post/Update PR comment
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const body = `${{ toJSON(steps.body.outputs.body) }}`.slice(1, -1);
            const owner = context.repo.owner;
            const repo = context.repo.repo;
            const issue_number = context.payload.pull_request.number;

            const marker = '<!-- pr-target-ci-results -->';
            const finalBody = `${marker}\n${body}`;

            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner, repo, issue_number, per_page: 100
            });

            const existing = comments.find(c => c.user?.type === 'Bot' && c.body?.includes(marker));

            if (existing) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner, repo, comment_id: existing.id, body: finalBody
              });
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner, repo, issue_number, body: finalBody
              });
            }

      - name: Fail workflow if tests failed
        if: ${{ steps.test.outcome != 'success' }}
        run: exit 1
